Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie for Roberto Torres and Julio Torres.

Mr. Louie stated that there was a calendaring error, that there was an address error on the Court's record, that the order on the third accounting did not set a future accounting date and that the order on the fourth accounting did set a date, but now the accounting was late. The Court noted that two orders to appear have been issued, that the Co-Trustees were also ordered to appear and questions why the Co-Trustees are not present. Mr. Louie stated that the Court had an old address of 13 years ago, that he has taken care of that, that the Co-Trustees are cooperating and that the Co-Trustees do what he informs them of. The Court stated that in the future, Mr. Louie is not authorized to excuse his Clients from appearing on an order to appear/order to show cause. Status on filing of the fifth account is continued to February 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the accounting is not filed, Mr. Louie and the Co-Trustees are ordered to appear on that date and show cause as to why they should not be removed. The accounting is to be filed by February 11, 2020. The orders to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Settlement Of Fourth Account; Approval Of Attorney Fees; And For Instructions
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie for Roberto Torres and Julio Torres (C0-Trustees).

The Court stated that it does not see how this is a petition for instructions, that Maria Reyes is named on the mortgage statement and questions who she is. Mr. Louie asks if the Court would be willing to consider a lien against the property, stated that Maria Reyes is Maria Cristina Escobar and that title of the property is in the trust. Mr. Louie also addressed the issue of notice stating that supplemental declarations do not statutory requirements on notice. The Petition for Settlement of Fourth Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
